mapper.insert: INSERT INTO app_user ( user_id, password_hash, email, role_code, otp_enabled, account_status ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{passwordHash}, #{email}, #{roleCode}, #{otpEnabled}, #{accountStatus} )
mapper.update: UPDATE app_user SET password_hash = #{passwordHash}, email = #{email}, role_code = #{roleCode}, otp_enabled = #{otpEnabled}, account_status = #{accountStatus} WHERE user_seq = #{userSeq}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO generation_rule ( user_seq, day_of_week, method_code, generator_code, set_count, analysis_draw_count, sort_order, use_yn ) SELECT #{userSeq}, 4, 'RANDOM', 'LOCAL', 5, NULL, 1, 'Y' FROM dual WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM generation_rule WHERE user_seq = #{userSeq} AND day_of_week = 4 AND method_code = 'RANDOM' AND generator_code = 'LOCAL' AND sort_order = 1 )

INSERT INTO generation_rule ( user_seq, day_of_week, method_code, generator_code, set_count, analysis_draw_count, sort_order, use_yn ) SELECT #{userSeq}, 4, 'HOT_NUMBER', 'CLAUDE', 5, 1000, 2, 'Y' FROM dual WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM generation_rule WHERE user_seq = #{userSeq} AND day_of_week = 4 AND method_code = 'HOT_NUMBER' AND generator_code = 'CLAUDE' AND sort_order = 2 )
